application_checklist.semantic_contract: Use for application checklist sections in UC5 render plans, especially practice_bridge, reflection, closure, assessment screen roles.

attribute_stack.semantic_contract: Use for attribute stack sections in UC5 render plans, especially deep_dive screen roles.

checklist_table.semantic_contract: Use for checklist table sections in UC5 render plans, especially practice_bridge, deep_dive, assessment screen roles.

commitment_card.semantic_contract: Use for commitment card sections in UC5 render plans, especially reflection, closure screen roles.

concept_card_grid.semantic_contract: Use for concept card grid sections in UC5 render plans, especially concept_map, deep_dive screen roles.

concept_explainer.semantic_contract: Use for concept explainer sections in UC5 render plans, especially concept_map, deep_dive screen roles.

coordination_matrix.semantic_contract: Use for stakeholder roles, responsibilities, handoffs, CISA/FBI/agency/provider coordination and whole-of-government role mapping.

decision_gate_panel.semantic_contract: Use for yes/no operational branches, escalation gates, exploitation signs, patchability, containment/re-scope gates. Do not use options[]; options[] remains quiz-only.

decision_option_panel.semantic_contract: Use for response paths, action choices, decision criteria, and branch implications. Do not use options[]; options[] remains quiz-only.

definition_block.semantic_contract: Use for definition block sections in UC5 render plans, especially concept_map, deep_dive screen roles.

definition_compare.semantic_contract: Use for definition compare sections in UC5 render plans, especially concept_map, deep_dive screen roles.

discussion_question_deck.semantic_contract: Use for facilitator questions, participant prompts, redirect/refocus questions, and comparison prompts.

hero_statement.semantic_contract: Use for hero statement sections in UC5 render plans, especially opening, concept_map, deep_dive, briefing screen roles.

information_sharing_matrix.semantic_contract: Use for who shares what information, with whom, through which channel, at what timing, and under what disclosure constraint such as TLP.

key_message_banner.semantic_contract: Use for key message banner sections in UC5 render plans, especially opening, reflection, closure screen roles.

method_stepper.semantic_contract: Use for method stepper sections in UC5 render plans, especially practice_bridge, process_overview, phase_detail screen roles.

module_intro.semantic_contract: Use for module intro sections in UC5 render plans, especially opening screen roles.

objective_list.semantic_contract: Use for objective list sections in UC5 render plans, especially opening screen roles.

outcome_badges.semantic_contract: Use for outcome badges sections in UC5 render plans, especially opening, reflection, closure screen roles.

outcome_capture_panel.semantic_contract: Use for desired discussion outcomes, lessons learned, decision records, improvement actions, and post-exercise takeaways.

phase_cards.semantic_contract: Use for phase cards sections in UC5 render plans, especially process_overview, phase_detail screen roles.

playbook_scope_card.semantic_contract: Use for applicability, scope, exclusions, target audience, triggering conditions, and when-to-use criteria.

principle_card.semantic_contract: Use for principle card sections in UC5 render plans, especially deep_dive, concept_map screen roles.

process_timeline.semantic_contract: Use for process timeline sections in UC5 render plans, especially process_overview, practice_bridge, phase_detail screen roles.

quiz_mcq.semantic_contract: Use for quiz mcq sections in UC5 render plans, especially assessment, reflection, decision_point screen roles.

reflection_prompt.semantic_contract: Use for reflection prompt sections in UC5 render plans, especially reflection, closure, debrief screen roles.

reporting_timeline.semantic_contract: Use for reporting deadlines, update cadence, notification path, CISA tracking, post-incident reporting and closure timing.

response_step_table.semantic_contract: Use for numbered procedures, checklist rows, action tracking, incident/vulnerability response steps.

scenario_inject_timeline.semantic_contract: Use for time-stamped or staged scenario injects, including Day/Time updates, alerts, discoveries, and public disclosure milestones.

scenario_quiz.semantic_contract: Use for scenario quiz sections in UC5 render plans, especially decision_point, assessment, inject screen roles.

stakeholder_map.semantic_contract: Use for stakeholder map sections in UC5 render plans, especially coordination, decision_gate, deep_dive screen roles.

status_classifier.semantic_contract: Use for operational state categories such as Not Affected, Susceptible, Compromised, Remediated, Mitigated, open/closed, or response status classes.

tradeoff_consequence_map.semantic_contract: Use for consequences, tradeoffs, risks, continuity implications, reputational concerns, and mitigation effects.

source_contract.category_policy: R2-2A does not include category because no source field exists in W02 RENDERABLE_COMPONENTS.
source_contract.w03_payload_policy_source: W03::C03 Build Slot Filling Render Package::payloadPolicyFor

component_selection_guardrails: Use decision_simulator-only components only after decision_simulator.scenario_decision_flow is selected.
Use scenario_inject_timeline for day/time injects, scenario progression, and staged facts revealed over time.
Use decision_option_panel for response choices, action paths, and decision criteria; do not use quiz options unless the section is explicitly assessment or scenario_quiz.
Use tradeoff_consequence_map for risks, benefits, second-order effects, continuity implications, and impact comparisons.
Use discussion_question_deck for facilitator questions and participant prompts.
Use outcome_capture_panel for desired discussion outcomes, debrief takeaways, lessons learned, and improvement items.
Use information_sharing_matrix for who shares what, with whom, through which channel, and under which disclosure protocol.
Keep scenario content grounded in the staged tabletop exercise. Do not turn every decision section into a quiz.
Use process_playbook-only components only after process_playbook.operational_step_flow is selected.
Use playbook_scope_card for scope, audience, applicability, and when-to-use criteria.
Use response_step_table for procedural rows, checklist rows, and action tracking.
Use decision_gate_panel for operational branches and escalation decisions, but never require options[] for this component.
Use coordination_matrix for role, responsibility, and handoff mapping.
Use reporting_timeline for notification, update, reporting, and closure cadence.
Use status_classifier for operational state categories such as Not Affected, Susceptible, Compromised, Remediated, or Mitigated.
